summary: Iteration 15 verification PASSED 11/11. Bug 1 (Languages): /api/programme.languages.programme_languages returns the exact 7-language ordered list [English, French, Haitian Creole, Brazilian Portuguese, Spanish, Bambara, Wolof]; note lists all 7 names and no longer contains 'step-by-step in English'; instruction_language mentions English + translator mode; translator_mode_core contains 'Haitian Creole'; translator_mode_best_effort contains 'Bambara'. Bug 2 (Quiz copy): (tabs)/quiz.tsx contains 'Each quiz is exactly 5 questions...' and no '10 questions'; quiz/[topicId].tsx eyebrow contains '5 questions' literal and no '10 questions'. Regression OK: /api/income/modules=200 with count=17, /=200, /healthz=200. Backend needed a manual supervisor restart for /api/programme to reflect updated JSON (content was loaded into memory at startup).
critical_code_review_comments: Note: /api/programme served stale cached language data until backend was restarted (sudo supervisorctl restart backend). This is expected since app_content.json is loaded into memory at app startup; main agent should be aware that JSON curriculum edits require a backend restart to take effect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified two content fixes (languages list + quiz '5 questions'). All 11 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_15.py pass. If curriculum_data JSON files are edited again, restart backend via supervisor so /api/programme returns fresh content.
rca_of_issue: N/A — verification only; both fixes are in place and behaving as specified.
